'''âj-p-b-j''' ('''kajapbejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:allonurse|allonurse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-p-b-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:allonurse|allonurse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-p-b-j
|-
! Lemma
| kajapbejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijapbejoko|thijapbejoko]] || [[word:jijapbejoko|jijapbejoko]] || [[word:shijapbejoko|shijapbejoko]] || [[word:kijapbejoko|kijapbejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujapbejoko|thuthujapbejoko]] || [[word:jujujapbejoko|jujujapbejoko]] || [[word:shushujapbejoko|shushujapbejoko]] || [[word:kukujapbejoko|kukujapbejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujapbejoko|thujapbejoko]] || [[word:jujapbejoko|jujapbejoko]] || [[word:shujapbejoko|shujapbejoko]] || [[word:kujapbejoko|kujapbejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojapbejoko|thojapbejoko]] || [[word:jojapbejoko|jojapbejoko]] || [[word:shojapbejoko|shojapbejoko]] || [[word:kojapbejoko|kojapbejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojapbejoko|thojapbejoko]] || [[word:jojapbejoko|jojapbejoko]] || [[word:shojapbejoko|shojapbejoko]] || [[word:kojapbejoko|kojapbejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjapbejoko|thĂŠjapbejoko]] || [[word:jĂŠjapbejoko|jĂŠjapbejoko]] || [[word:shĂŠjapbejoko|shĂŠjapbejoko]] || [[word:kĂŠjapbejoko|kĂŠjapbejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajapbejoko|thathajapbejoko]] || [[word:jajajapbejoko|jajajapbejoko]] || [[word:shashajapbejoko|shashajapbejoko]] || [[word:kakajapbejoko|kakajapbejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajapbejoko|thajapbejoko]] || [[word:jajapbejoko|jajapbejoko]] || [[word:shajapbejoko|shajapbejoko]] || [[word:kajapbejoko|kajapbejoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shajapbejithi|shajapbejithi]] || [[word:shajapbejiji|shajapbejiji]] || [[word:shajapbejishi|shajapbejishi]] || [[word:shajapbejiki|shajapbejiki]]
